summary: Additive rankBy lens + per-call rank echo. W2 added `volatility` (echo `atrp`); W3 added `oi_change` (alias `oid`) — REAL OI delta over the oi_snapshots store (echo `oi_change_pct`+`oi_change_window`). rankBy omitted/'oi' ⇒ byte-identical to the pre-wave shape (no rank_* keys). tools/list unchanged (9); rankBy is a param.

calls_item.notes: funding_apr is number|null (null when the venue's funding interval is unknown — never guessed). oi_change ranks only coins with ≥2 OI snapshots spanning the window; warming coins are omitted from the ranking entirely. Echo attached at OUTPUT assembly, never cached into the rank-independent verdict cell.

input_schema_additive.rankBy: string, optional, default 'oi'. Canonical: oi|volume|gainers|losers|movers|funding_positive|funding_negative|volatility|oi_change. Aliases (resolved by the MCP, the bot forwards raw): vol|gain|lose|move|pfr|nfr|atr|oid. Raw string (not a Zod enum) so the bot can forward an alias verbatim; resolveRankBy validates.

invalid_rank_by.note: Returned BEFORE quota/scan/charge for a NON-EMPTY unknown token. Omitted/empty ⇒ default 'oi' (no error).

cache_contract.okx_funding: OKX has no bulk funding endpoint (50014). funding_* on OKX ranks the top-RANK_FUNDING_POOL_SIZE-by-OI pool (default 150) via per-instId fetches in a coalesced cache: ttl 3min, loadTimeout 900ms (cold serves empty fallback, load self-warms), negativeTtl 30s, lazy background warmer (long-lived server only). Request path never fans out (<1s).
cache_contract.same_call_funding: BYBIT/BITGET/HL carry funding (+ Bybit fundingIntervalHour) on the bulk ticker — no extra call.
cache_contract.atrp_volatility: volatility ranks the top-RANK_ATRP_POOL_SIZE-by-OI pool (default 50) by ATRP = ATR(14 Wilder)÷price×100, via getAdapter(ex).getCandles per pool coin (no new kline mapping). Coalesced cache keyed exchange:timeframe: ttl 2min, loadTimeout 900ms (cold serves empty fallback <1s, self-warms), no background warmer (key space exchange×timeframe). atrp echoed at OUTPUT (never cached into the verdict cell).
cache_contract.oi_change_store: oi_change reads the self-maintained oi_snapshots postgres store (NOT a live venue fetch) — computeOiDeltaForPool returns current vs nearest snapshot ≥window-ago (24h). The hourly oi-snapshot-sampler is the warmer; a 60s coalescedCache (keyed exchange) memoizes the per-venue delta read (loadTimeout 900ms cold-serves empty, processGate skips in script context). Store empty/warming ⇒ empty result (never blocks). oi_change_pct+oi_change_window echoed at OUTPUT (never cached into the verdict cell).

consumers: src/lib/x402-http-routes.ts (x402 paid scan route — forwards rankBy)
src/lib/oi-snapshots.ts (computeOiDelta over oi_snapshots) — the SAME source the get_trade_call OI factor reads (single-derivation; W3)
